query: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND (TABLE_NAME LIKE '%invoice%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%session%') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
